name: Regret Minimization Framework
what_it_is: Project yourself to age 80 and ask which choice you would regret not having made.
core_mechanic: Separate short-term discomfort from long-term regret. Identify which decision you'd look back on wishing you'd made differently. Useful when fear or inertia is distorting analysis.
when_to_use: Personal/career decisions where emotion is clouding analysis / Choosing between safe path and uncertain higher-upside one / Done analytical work and still can't decide
when_not_to_use: Operational or tactical decisions / Reversible choices / Pure product decisions
ideaos_application: Agent 3 frames the decision from the 80-year-old perspective, identifies which option carries higher regret risk, separates reversible from irreversible elements.
